creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #0)

Some more details would be useful. E.g., which command you ran (arc something), which pkg repo you're using (quarterly, latest, your own package server).

Please note that all php80* ports are deprecated end of this month.

From looking at the ports involved, it seems like pcre2 is a dependency of lang/php80 (not of mbstring directly). "pkg -d php80" should show pcre2 (10.42)  as a dependency.

So you could try to re-install pcre2 (pkg install pcre2) or a different version of php (pkg install arcanist-php81).

One way or another, I don't think this is arcanist specific, but a problem with php80 / php80-mbstring (potentially on 14 only, I only checked 13.2, where it worked ok when installed on a clean system).
